creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
FreeBSD ports manual pages are installed in /usr/local/share/man/ now.

There are still 3 ports which install the manual pages in the outdated location /usr/local/man

./jove-4.17.5.3.pkg.gz:./usr/local/man/man1/jove.1
./jove-4.17.5.3.pkg.gz:./usr/local/man/man1/teachjove.1
./pdfsandwich-0.1.7_42.pkg.gz:./usr/local/man/man1/pdfsandwich.1.gz
./py311-iocage-1.2_13.pkg.gz:./usr/local/man/man8/iocage.8.gz
./py311-iocage-devel-1.6.20240531_1,1.pkg.gz:./usr/local/man/man8/iocage.8.gz
